Papers

1. "Autonomy's Path: Operations Transformed with Production Logistics"
Co-authored with Austin Locke — Manufacturing Leadership Council, January 31, 2025
Covers why material flow automation has lagged behind primary manufacturing processes, and why integrated production logistics is essential to autonomous operations.
→ Link
"Modernizing Advanced Process Control with MLOps Principles" — Kalypso Viewpoints, August 2025
Covers Industrial DevOps and MLOps applied to APC systems, including a PoC using Rockwell's Studio 5000 SDK, Azure DevOps, and FactoryTalk Logix Echo to automate control code and model deployment.
→ kalypso.com/viewpoints/entry/modernizing-advanced-process-control-with-mlops-principles
3. "Track Stiffness Transition Zone Studied with Three-Dimensional Sandwich Track Model"
Co-authored with Hai Huang — Transportation Research Record, 2013
This appears to be from your time at Penn State Altoona (Division of Business and Engineering). Academic/civil engineering paper, so likely pre-Kalypso.
→ Link
4. Production Logistics Viewpoints- https://kalypso.com/services/data-science/production-logistics- January 2026
